narrative:
Coolville Village (precinct in Athens County) has 313 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 12.1 percentage points.
